data.body: PASS 1 (G1G2 scope-accuracy) review — findings posted to the review record. Key grounded discrepancies: (1) the T201 "all 42 live in _engine/rebar_reconciler, NOT the CLI" claim is contradicted by inline `# noqa: T201` sites in src/rebar/graph/_links.py:190 and src/rebar/_io/_cli.py:72-126; (2) "empty the allowlist entirely" conflicts with the plan's own keep-legitimate-prints stance and the surviving per-file-ignores (_engine_support, _commands, _alias.py, rebar_reconciler, jira-capability-probe); (3) the "_io/ can be removed from the allowlist" item is stale — _io is already absent from pyproject's per-file-ignores.
